title: CORE Morphology Record
description: A single inflected surface form derived from a lemma, with an explicit morphological feature bundle.

lemma_id.description: Foreign key to the lemma record.

surface_form.description: The inflected surface form in the pack's native script. Unicode NFC.

features.description: Morphological feature bundle. Keys vary by language and part of speech. Examples for Hebrew verbs: stem, aspect, person, gender, number. Examples for Greek verbs: tense, voice, mood, person, number. Examples for English: tense, person, number.

notes.description: Optional notes on irregular forms, defective paradigms, or disambiguation.
